name: Double Chocolate Walnut Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter and flour a large baking sheet.
3. In a bowl, whisk together flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. In another bowl with an electric mixer, beat together butter and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Add eggs and beat until combined well.
6. Stir in the flour mixture to form a stiff dough.
7. Stir in walnuts and chocolate chips.
8. On prepared baking sheet, shape dough into two slightly flattened logs, each 12 inches long and 2 inches wide.
9. Sprinkle logs with confectioners' sugar.
10. Bake for 35 minutes, or until slightly firm to the touch.
11. Cool biscotti on baking sheet for 5 minutes.
12. On a cutting board, cut biscotti diagonally into 3/4 inch slices.
13. Arrange slices on baking sheet and bake for an additional 10 minutes, until crisp.
14. Remove from oven and let cool on a rack. Store in air-tight containers for up to 1 week, or freeze for up to 1 month.
